calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-17-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

David Marcolini, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff NCEP, LLC ASSIGNEE OF HSBC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant ALEX SAJKOVIC.
Declaration of Katrisha Hugley pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
Defendant's Doses 1-15 dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff NCEP, LLC ASSIGNEE OF HSBC and against Defendant ALEX SAJKOVIC as follows:
Principal $3,109.39
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $0.00
Costs $350.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $3,459.39
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-03-2014 Set For Trial On Nov-17-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
